title: diplopenta odorata
side_effects: Diplopenta odorata can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its high toxicity. In severe cases, consuming large amounts of the plant can lead to seizures, convulsions, and even coma. Additionally, improper use of diplopenta odorata can also cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory problems, especially in individuals with pre-existing conditions. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant-based remedy to avoid these potential side effects.
